200.description: Payment result — either success confirmation or 3DS redirect details

schema.description: Payment processing result. Two possible outcomes: (1) Paid — payment completed, status is 'paid'. (2) 3DS Required — additional authentication needed, acsUrl and related fields are populated.

success.description: Whether the payment request was processed without error

status.description: Payment status: 'paid' if complete, '3ds_required' if SCA redirect is needed, 'failed' on error

acsUrl.description: URL to redirect the cardholder to for 3D Secure authentication

cReq.description: Base64-encoded payload to POST to the ACS URL (CReq)

threeDSSessionData.description: Transaction ID to include in the 3DS challenge flow

message.description: Error or decline reason when status is failed

sandbox.description: Whether this was a sandbox request (sandbox keys cannot process payments)

schema.title: PaymentResult

schema.description: Standard error response returned by all endpoints when a request fails (4xx/5xx)

statusCode.description: HTTP status code indicating the type of error

message.description: Human-readable error message, or an array of validation error strings for 422 responses

error.description: Short error label matching the HTTP status text

schema.title: Error

403.description: Invalid API key, IP not whitelisted, or origin not allowed

schema.description: Standard error response returned by all endpoints when a request fails (4xx/5xx)

statusCode.description: HTTP status code indicating the type of error

message.description: Human-readable error message, or an array of validation error strings for 422 responses

error.description: Short error label matching the HTTP status text

schema.title: Error

422.description: Validation failed — check message array for details

schema.description: Standard error response returned by all endpoints when a request fails (4xx/5xx)

statusCode.description: HTTP status code indicating the type of error

message.description: Human-readable error message, or an array of validation error strings for 422 responses

error.description: Short error label matching the HTTP status text

schema.title: Error

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check Retry-After header

schema.description: Error response returned when a client exceeds their configured rate limit

retryAfter.description: Number of seconds the client should wait before retrying

schema.title: RateLimitError
